productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Blue Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 33 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 12 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleZipper at the back for additional space   Decorative metal loop on the frontMetallic embellishment with brand name on the frontLegs at baseCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
